prompt: A highly realistic Blu-ray disc cover featuring a portrait of a young Japanese woman. She has short, messy black bob hair and wears large, round, thin wire-rimmed glasses. She is dressed in a thick, textured, dark red knit sweater. Her expression is soft and alluring, looking directly at the viewer. The background is a softly blurred, warm-toned indoor setting, possibly a cafe, with a glimpse of a white coffee cup and saucer on a table to the right. The lighting is warm and cinematic, highlighting her face and the texture of the sweater. The image is framed within a standard blue Blu-ray case border, complete with the Blu-ray Disc logo at the top center, top right, and bottom left corners. On the left side, there is large, elegant vertical Japanese text that reads '魔女乃家 林檎' with smaller furigana text beside it reading 'まじょのいえ りんご', accompanied by delicate, glowing pink decorative lines and star/pentagram motifs. In the bottom right corner, there is smaller Japanese text reading '魔女のように、あなたを魅了する。' above the English text 'R I N G O' and 'M A J Y O N O I E'.
